title: Diagnostic Services
shortDescription: Advanced diagnostic facilities for accurate and timely medical reports.
description: Our Diagnostic Services provide reliable and accurate medical testing using modern equipment and experienced laboratory professionals. We ensure fast report delivery and maintain the highest standards of quality to support accurate diagnosis and effective treatment.

title: NICU & Baby Care
shortDescription: Specialized intensive care and healthcare services for newborn babies.
description: Our NICU & Baby Care Unit is dedicated to providing specialized medical care for premature, low birth weight, and critically ill newborns. Equipped with advanced neonatal technology and experienced pediatric specialists, we ensure the highest level of care for every baby.
